title: Rent vs Buy Calculator - Should You Rent or Buy?
description: Free rent vs buy calculator. Compare the total cost of renting versus buying a home over time. Make an informed housing decision.
keywords: rent vs buy calculator, rent or buy, renting vs buying, housing cost comparison, should I buy a house
intro: Compare the financial costs of renting versus buying. Enter your details to see which option is better for your situation.

faq.q: Is it cheaper to rent or buy?
faq.a: It depends on location, how long you stay, home appreciation, and interest rates. Generally, buying is better if you stay 5+ years.
Buying costs include mortgage payments, property tax, insurance, maintenance (1-2% of home value/year), PMI, and closing costs.
The 5-year rule suggests buying only if you plan to stay at least 5 years, allowing time to recoup closing costs and build equity.
